column1:
Distinguish between syntax, runtime, and logic errors, and common error types.  
Interpret error messages to help detect and address code errors.  
Conduct good coding practice by testing code frequently.  
Identify and correct syntax errors in code.  
Recognize and differentiate between various types of runtime errors.
